summary: Iteration 10: Tested all new Organizer Dashboard features. 15/15 backend tests passed, all UI components verified working. Features: OrganizerEventPage, add participant manually, promo codes CRUD, social sharing, RFID/timing integration info, contact admin.

Backend Test 2: Admin login - PASSED
Backend Test 3: POST /api/organizer/events/{event_id}/add-participant - PASSED

Backend Test 14: Registrations include participant data - PASSED
Backend Test 15: GET /api/organizer/events/{event_id}/export-timing returns CSV - PASSED

UI Test 2: Stats cards (Inscrits, Places restantes, Taux remplissage, Revenus, Payés) visible - PASSED
UI Test 3: Fill rate gauge with per-race breakdowns visible - PASSED
UI Test 4: All 4 tabs visible (registrations, promos, share, contact) - PASSED

UI Test 6: Add participant dialog opens and form fields work - PASSED
UI Test 7: Promo codes tab shows table and create button - PASSED

UI Test 9: Share tab with copy link and social buttons (Facebook/Twitter/WhatsApp/LinkedIn) - PASSED

UI Test 11: Contact Admin tab with type selector, subject, message, send button - PASSED

UI Test 13: OrganizerDashboard event name links to /organizer/event/{eventId} - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Test promo codes created and deleted during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 testing complete. All new Organizer Dashboard features verified: 1) OrganizerEventPage at /organizer/event/:eventId shows stats (Inscrits, Places restantes, Taux remplissage, Revenus, Payés), fill rate gauge with per-race breakdowns, 4 tabs (registrations/promos/share/contact). 2) Registrations tab has table with filters (search, race, category, status) and add participant button. 3) Add participant dialog allows manual registration. 4) Promo codes tab shows list and create dialog. 5) Share tab has copy link, social buttons (Facebook/Twitter/WhatsApp/LinkedIn), RFID endpoint info, export CSV button. 6) Contact Admin tab has type selector, subject, message fields. 7) EventDetailPage share dropdown on hover shows Facebook/Twitter/WhatsApp/Copy options. 8) OrganizerDashboard event names link to /organizer/event/{eventId}.

mocked_apis.RFID_integration: POST /api/rfid-read is simulated - no real hardware (MOCKED)

new_features_tested: OrganizerEventPage with stats cards and fill rate gauge
Registrations tab with filters and table
Social sharing buttons (Facebook, Twitter, WhatsApp, LinkedIn)
